spec: user should not be able to login with invalid credentials for\nhttps://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login

plan.goal: Verify that a user cannot log in with invalid credentials
assumptions: The login page is accessible at the provided URL.
The application returns appropriate error messages for invalid login attempts.

args.description: Test login functionality with invalid credentials
